codeReview.summary: The rerun fix directly addresses the prior blocking issue on `/global`. Commit `02499813df68034a2763adad874af1987d6bb538` changes `src/modules/global.ts` itself so null persisted market caps on the shared runtime no longer produce invalid percentage math, and it adds focused regression coverage proving `/global` stays 200 under the reproduced null-market-cap data state while `/search` and `/coins/categories` remain contract-compatible.

summary: Pass: later commit `02499813df68034a2763adad874af1987d6bb538` directly fixes the scoped `/global` shared-runtime failure by guarding dominance percentage calculations in `src/modules/global.ts:43-49` and `src/modules/global.ts:227-287`, with regression tests at `tests/app.test.ts:5616-5687` covering the reproduced null-market-cap runtime state.
